world_contract.description: A realistic warehouse aisle environment where a humanoid robot carrying a cardboard box encounters an unpredictable human worker, captured from a static surveillance perspective.

locked_entities.appearance: A bipedal humanoid robot standing 1.7 meters tall, featuring a matte white and dark grey composite chassis, exposed metallic silver joints at the knees and elbows, and a thin glowing blue horizontal status light strip on its chest plate. It has no facial features, only a smooth black glass visor on its head.
locked_entities.material: Matte composite polymer and brushed aluminum

locked_entities.appearance: A male human worker of medium build, wearing a bright neon yellow high-visibility safety vest with silver reflective strips over a navy blue long-sleeve shirt, dark grey work pants, tan steel-toe boots, and a white plastic hard hat.

A standard rectangular corrugated cardboard box, plain brown with no printed text or logos, sealed along the center seam with clear glossy packing tape. Dimensions are approximately 40cm x 40cm x 30cm.
locked_entities.default_relation: held_by robot_01 at chest level with both hands

locked_environment.layout: A straight warehouse aisle bounded on both sides by tall industrial steel storage racks painted orange and blue, packed with wooden pallets holding shrink-wrapped boxes. The aisle floor is smooth, light grey polished concrete with painted yellow safety boundary lines running parallel to the racks.
locked_environment.floor: Polished light grey concrete with minor scuff marks and parallel yellow safety lines.
locked_environment.lighting: Even, overhead high-bay industrial LED lighting casting soft, diffuse shadows downwards.
locked_environment.style: Realistic surveillance camera footage, slightly high-angle, static frame, neutral color grading, natural industrial warehouse atmosphere.

object_registry.surface_details: Seamless panel gaps, metallic bolts visible at joint pivots, smooth black glass visor reflecting overhead lights.
Reflective silver stripes on vest front and back, matte white hard hat surface, fabric folds on sleeves and pants.
Slightly visible corrugated texture lines, single strip of clear tape reflecting light along the top seam.

scene_registry.spatial_map: Aisle width 2.5 meters. Left rack boundary at x = -1.25m, right rack boundary at x = 1.25m. Robot starts at center x = 0.0m, y = 2.0m, moving forward along positive y-axis. Human starts at x = 0.8m, y = 4.5m.

reference_assets.description: The master background canvas of the empty warehouse aisle under high-bay lighting, used to anchor spatial consistency.
High-resolution orthographic views of the humanoid robot from front, side, and back.
Reference sheet of the human worker wearing the specified safety gear in various standing and walking poses.
The initial frame of the video sequence showing the robot holding the box at y=2.0m and the human worker standing at y=4.5m, captured from the corner security camera view.

identity_checks.method: VLM color histogram comparison on cropped robot bounding box across frames
identity_checks.pass_condition: Matte white and dark grey ratio remains within 5% tolerance across all frames, with blue status light present.

identity_checks.method: VLM attribute verification for safety gear presence
identity_checks.pass_condition: Neon yellow vest and white hard hat must be detected on the human actor in 100% of frames where the actor is visible.

identity_checks.method: Bounding box aspect ratio and color consistency check
identity_checks.pass_condition: The box must maintain its rectangular shape and plain brown color, remaining attached to the robot's hands unless a collision event occurs.

identity_checks.method: Structural similarity index (SSIM) on static background regions
identity_checks.pass_condition: SSIM of non-moving background regions (racks, floor lines) remains above 0.92 relative to the first frame.

consistency_requirements: The humanoid robot must maintain its matte white and grey chassis across all frames.
The human worker must wear the neon yellow safety vest and white hard hat.
The cardboard box must remain held by the robot unless dropped during a collision event.
The camera must remain static to simulate a fixed surveillance feed.
